dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, we lost good people during {quest_origin}. The {quest_stakes} gave their lives defending us, and the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} still out there.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I cannot let their sacrifice go unanswered. We need to {quest_action}. {quest_ally} tracked them to an area {location_hint}. Find them and collect {quest_item} from the {quest_focus} as proof.
dialogueChunks.outro: Those we lost were family to this settlement. Their memory demands justice.

dialogueChunks.intro: The {quest_threat} killed people we cared about, {player_name}. The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_was} out doing their work when they were taken from us. We found what was left.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The community is grieving and furious. We need to {quest_action} {quest_time_pressure}. The {quest_focus} is somewhere {location_hint}. Take {quest_item} to help deal with them.
dialogueChunks.outro: We lay our people to rest soon. I want to tell them it is done.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, during {quest_origin}, the {quest_threat} killed the {quest_stakes} in cold blood. The victim was kin to half this settlement.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The whole community wants justice. I need you to {quest_action} from the {quest_focus}. {quest_ally} says they are holed up {location_hint}. Recover {quest_item} from the scene as evidence.
dialogueChunks.outro: The family deserves closure, and {quest_reward_hint} has been set aside for exactly this purpose.
